Like a n1nja |checkboxAutoTeams=Yes |checkbox2=No |role=Jungler |issub1=No |istrainee1=No |issub2=No |istrainee2=No |issub3=No |istrainee3=No |issub4=No |istrainee4=No |issub5=No |istrainee5=No |checkbox3=No |stream=https://ch.sooplive.co.kr/xoals137 |facebook=https://www.facebook.com/clid0707 |instagram=clid_taemin |youtube=https://www.youtube.com/@clid123 |lolpros=https://lolpros.gg/player/clid/ |deeplol=https://www.deeplol.gg/pro/Clid |checkboxSuppressOrgNavbox=No |checkboxSBS=Yes |checkboxTOCR=Yes |checkboxIsSub=No |checkbox-res=No |checkboxPrev=No }} ==Biography== ===2016 Season=== Clid joined [[Newbee Young]] in January of 2016. The team had a mediocre showing during the [[LSPL/2016 Season/Spring Season|2016 LSPL Spring Season]], finishing 6th during the regular season and missing out on playoffs. During the [[LSPL/2016 Season/Summer Season|2016 LSPL Summer Season]], however, the team dominated the league and finished 1st in both the regular season and playoffs, qualifying for the LPL. Because the Newbee organization already had a team in the LPL, the Newbee Young team had to change organizations. They rebranded to [[QG Reapers]]. ===2017 Season=== Clid remained on QG Reapers for the [[LPL/2017 Season/Spring Season|2017 LPL Spring Season]] and started for every game except one. The team placed 3rd in their group, but in playoffs lost 2-3 to [[I May]] in the first round. In May 2017, [[JD Gaming]] acquired the team's roster and LPL spot. Although Clid remained with the team, he split play time with the team's other jungler, [[Xinyi]], and only played for a few games of the [[Demacia_Cup/2017_Season|2017 Demacia Cup]] and [[LPL/2017_Season/Summer_Season|2017 LPL Summer Season]]. JD Gaming had poor showings in both tournaments, finishing 11th-12th in the former and 5th in group in the latter. They also placed 2nd at the [[National Electronic Sports Tournament 2017]], although Clid did not play in that tournament. At the end of the season, Xinyi left the team, but the team picked up rookie jungler [[xiaohan (Pan Han)|xiaohan]] as a replacement to share play time with Clid. == Trivia == {{PlayerStatsTrivia}} * Speaks Chinese fluently. ** Once when [[Faker]] and Clid had an interview together for [[SK Telecom T1]], he amazed Faker by answering all the questions in Chinese instead of Korean. * He is suspended for 12 months from all Riot-affiliated tournaments and 18 months from Korean tournaments for continuous sexual harassment, unprofessional and immoral conduct, and criminal offences. === Awards === * LCK 1st All-Pro Team x1 (Spring 2020) * LCK 2nd All-Pro Team x1 (Summer 2020) * LCK 3rd All-Pro Team x1 (Spring 2021) == Tournament Results == {{PlayerResults|show=overviewpage}} {{PlayerShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} {{PlayerResults1v1|show=overviewpage}} ==Media== {{PlayerMedia}} === Images === {{PlayerProfileGallery}} {{PlayerPageEnd}}
